pattern: A single linear scan tracks a running streak of ones and the best streak seen so far.
hints: Walk the array once while remembering how long the current run of ones is.
Reset the running count to zero on every zero, and grow it on every one.
Keep a separate maximum that you update with the running count after each step; return that maximum.

edge_inputs.description: best run is at the very end
best run is at the very start

stress.description: random binary array with bias toward ones to create long runs
